pets.name: Embervein Wyvern
pets.ability: Scorched Earth — deals void-fire AoE in a 3x3 grid
pets.description: A wyvern whose veins run with molten celestial ore.

pets.name: Frostbone Hound
pets.ability: Glacial Howl — slows enemy attack speed by 20% for 5 turns
pets.description: A spectral wolf that hunts from the frozen north.

pets.name: Runesworn Owl
pets.ability: Arcane Sight — reveals hidden enemy traps and ambushes
pets.description: An ancient owl bound to the oldest rune-stone.
